mapper.select: SELECT role_id, role_name, role_code, description FROM sys_role WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = '0' ORDER BY sort
SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = '0'
SELECT permission_id, permission_name, permission_code, resource_type, parent_id, path, api_path, method, sort FROM sys_permission WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = '0' ORDER BY sort
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (role_id, role_name, role_code, description, sort, status) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{roleName}, #{roleCode}, #{description}, 0, '0')
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission (permission_id, permission_name, permission_code, resource_type, parent_id, path, api_path, method, sort, status) VALUES (#{permissionId}, #{permissionName}, #{permissionCode}, #{resourceType}, #{parentId}, #{path}, #{apiPath}, #{method}, #{sort}, '0')
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_permission SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE permission_id = #{permissionId}
